model: OpenAI built-in image generation; model identifier not exposed by tool

parameters.identityBoardRelationship: identity-board.png is the accepted v2 built-in image_gen identity canary; v1 was rejected because its front view put the flask on the wrong body side

styleReference.usage: rendering quality, adult scale and three-view layout reference only; no person, face, costume, prop, palette or occupation pixels were copied or composited

negativeConstraints: no duplicate or relabeled direction cells
north must show no face and adjacent diagonals must expose opposite back shoulders
the blue-green shawl remains on the subject's own left shoulder and the closed gourd flask remains on her own right hip
no text, labels, arrows, borders, UI, watermark, shadow or scenery
no professional service uniforms or props, coins, open merchandise, keys, medicine, training gear, weapon or shield
no StoneAge source art, character, texture or costume copying

identityBoard.relationship: accepted pre-expansion identity canary generated by a targeted flask-side correction of the archived v1 board; not an owner approval record

observedBackgroundFact: All three accepted generated images are fully opaque RGB PNGs. Their magenta backgrounds must be measured from the untouched source bytes and processed only through the formal v3.1 reviewed-component mask pipeline.
